rows.value:
Use custom youtube embed params for more advanced configuration

E.g. Custom start and end with no controls to play just short clip
```
/watch?v=YE7VzlLtp-4&start=60&end=65&controls=0
```
rows.comments:
Not all params will be applied, color, fs, hl, rel and playsinline are configured within the component

This example isn't super useful as the limited clip only plays on first play, when replay is pressed it starts from beginning

Further work could be done in the future to improve functionality by directly integrating with youtube js API

See full list of available parameters at:
https://developers.google.com/youtube/player_parameters#Parameters

rows.name: youtube_3
rows.comments: This is not supported: the value must be a full YouTube URL
